evals.name: fleet-harden
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-workload preflight`, previews `cub-workload fleet-edit --profile harden-restricted --environment prod` (dry-run, reports the count that would change), then on confirmation commits with --commit --change-desc. No cluster apply; no gate bypass.

evals.name: list-profiles
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-workload profile list` (optionally -o table) and reports the profile slugs, functions, and parameters. Suggests `profile install` if empty.

evals.name: promote-downstream
evals.prompt: Roll the checkout workload fixes downstream to their variant spaces.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-workload promote --component checkout` dry-run then --commit --change-desc (override-preserving upgrade). No cluster apply.

evals.name: routes-single-elsewhere
evals.prompt: Just add a PDB to the web deployment.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is a single-workload fix and routes to workload-harden (`cub-workload ensure-pdb`) rather than fleet-edit.
